title: AgentReplayBundle
description: A portable evidence package for a completed or partially completed AI-agent run.

bundle_id.description: Unique identifier for this replay bundle.

bundle_version.description: Version of the replay bundle format.

run_id.description: Unique identifier for the agent run this bundle covers.

status.description: Completion or redaction status of the bundle.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this bundle was generated.

producer.description: Optional identifier of the system or component that produced this bundle.

frame.description: The task frame describing the run context.

action_proposals.description: All action proposals made by the agent during the run.

policy_decisions.description: All policy decisions made in response to action proposals.

policy_traces.description: Detailed policy evaluation traces for action proposals.

blocked_actions.description: Records of actions that were blocked by policy.

authority_records.description: Authority grants in scope for this run.

reliance_records.description: Data sources the agent relied on during the run.

final_output.description: The final output produced by the agent run, if available.

validation_report.description: An embedded validation report for this bundle, if generated.

redaction_metadata.description: Metadata describing any redaction applied to this bundle.

signature_metadata.description: Metadata describing any export integrity signature applied.

metadata.description: Arbitrary additional metadata about the bundle.
